2604.05854.title: Deep Researcher Agent: An Autonomous Framework for 24/7 Deep Learning Experimentation with Zero-Cost Monitoring
2604.05854.paper_summary: We present \textbf{Deep Researcher Agent}, an open-source framework that enables large language model (LLM) agents to autonomously conduct deep learning experiments around the clock. Unlike existing AI research assistants that focus on paper writing or code generation, our system addresses the full experiment lifecycle: hypothesis formation, code implementation, training execution, result analysis, and iterative refinement. The framework introduces three key innovations: (1) \textbf{Zero-Cost Monitoring} -- a monitoring paradigm that incurs zero LLM API costs during model training by relying solely on process-level checks and log file reads; (2) \textbf{Two-Tier Constant-Size Memory} -- a memory architecture capped at $\sim$5K characters regardless of runtime duration, preventing the unbounded context growth that plagues long-running agents; and (3) \textbf{Minimal-Toolset Leader-Worker Architecture} -- a multi-agent design where each worker agent is equipped with only 3--5 tools, reducing per-call token overhead by up to 73\%. In sustained deployments spanning 30+ days, the framework autonomously completed 500+ experiment cycles across four concurrent research projects, achieving a 52\% improvement over baseline metrics in one project through 200+ automated experiments -- all at an average LLM cost of \$0.08 per 24-hour cycle. Code is available at https://github.com/Xiangyue-Zhang/auto-deep-researcher-24x7.
2604.05854.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了\textbf{Deep Researcher Agent}，這是一個開源框架，使大型語言模型（LLM）代理能夠自主地進行深度學習實驗，全天候運行。與現有專注於論文寫作或代碼生成的AI研究助手不同，我們的系統涵蓋了整個實驗生命周期：假設形成、代碼實現、訓練執行、結果分析和迭代精煉。該框架引入了三項關鍵創新：（1）\textbf{零成本監控}——一種監控範式，在模型訓練期間通過僅依賴過程級檢查和日誌文件讀取來實現零LLM API成本；（2）\textbf{雙層恆定大小記憶體}——一種記憶體架構，其大小限制在約5K字符，無論運行時間長短，防止了困擾長時間運行代理的無界上下文增長；（3）\textbf{最小工具集領導-工作者架構}——一種多代理設計，每個工作者代理僅配備3到5個工具，將每次調用的令牌開銷降低了多達73\%。在持續部署超過30天的情況下，該框架自主完成了500多個實驗週期，涵蓋四個同時進行的研究項目，在一個項目中通過200多個自動化實驗實現了相較基準指標52\%的改進——所有這些的平均LLM成本為每24小時週期\$0.08。代碼可在https://github.com/Xiangyue-Zhang/auto-deep-researcher-24x7獲得。
2604.05854.author: Xiangyue Zhang et.al.
